server.description: Server definitions keyed by language ID (e.g., 'rust', 'python').

outline_threshold.description: Minimum line count for defensive outlines.

outline_suppress.description: Glob patterns whose outlines are suppressed from automatic display. Symbols remain available via into.

commands.description: Denylist-based command filtering. Commands not in the deny list are allowed.

inherit.description: Inherit user config (project config only). When false, the project's deny sections replace the user's entirely.

allow.description: Commands to un-deny (project config only). Removes commands from the inherited deny and deny_when_first sets.

deny.description: Always-deny commands. Each key is a command name (or quoted 'command subcommand'), each value is a guidance message.

deny_when_first.description: Deny-when-first commands. Denied at pipe position 0, allowed mid-pipeline. Each key is a command name, each value is a guidance message.

args.description: Arguments to pass to the command.

initialization_options.description: Initialization options to pass to the LSP server during the 'initialize' request.

settings.description: Server-specific settings returned in workspace/configuration responses. The TOML nesting mirrors the JSON the server expects. Catenary matches the 'section' path from configuration requests and returns the subtree.
